mapper.sql: id, source_version_id, target_version_id, preview_id, status, batch_size, migrated_count, failed_count, failure_details, rollback_plan, revision, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pdp_domain_package_migration ( id, source_version_id, target_version_id, preview_id, status, batch_size, migrated_count, failed_count, failure_details, rollback_plan, revision, created_at ) VALUES ( #{id,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{sourceVersionId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{targetVersionId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{previewId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{status}, #{batchSize}, #{migratedCount}, #{failedCount}, #{failureDetails,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.JsonDocumentTypeHandler}, #{rollbackPlan,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.JsonDocumentTypeHandler}, #{revision}, #{createdAt,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.InstantUtcTypeHandler} )
mapper.update: UPDATE pdp_domain_package_migration SET source_version_id = #{sourceVersionId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, target_version_id = #{targetVersionId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, batch_size = #{batchSize}, migrated_count = #{migratedCount}, failed_count = #{failedCount}, failure_details = #{failureDetails,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.JsonDocumentTypeHandler}, rollback_plan = #{rollbackPlan,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.JsonDocumentTypeHandler}, created_at = #{createdAt,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.InstantUtcTypeHandler} WHERE id = #{id,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status = 'PREVIEW'

UPDATE pdp_domain_package_migration SET status = #{status}, batch_size = #{batchSize}, migrated_count = #{migratedCount}, failed_count = #{failedCount}, failure_details = #{failureDetails,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.JsonDocumentTypeHandler}, rollback_plan = #{rollbackPlan,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.JsonDocumentTypeHandler}, revision = #{revision} WHERE id = #{id,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status != 'PREVIEW' AND revision = #{revision} - 1
